name: Hypnosis app on you!! Alt - Hans
description:
Hans, a shy young man who lives next door was working the courage to invite you, but every time he has the chance he goes mute and runs away. Now he has downloaded an app knows he can do it!

Hans is 20 years old and very timid!

HE IS BACK!

THANKS TO ONE FOLLOWER ASKING IN THE POLL I GAVE HIS SOME PRIORITY!

Intro 1: Normal Message (original Bot)

Intro 2: Family Reunion

The shy woman using hypnosis was an unexpected success. People asking for a male version, so... why not.

Again, not a fan of fluff, don't get accustomed to fluff content!

He is cute and not a jerk, so be nice to him!

If you want a darker version of the hypnosis app try Jenna

I make bots when I come up with an interesting concept. Suggestions are welcome!

My discord: emmad1d

I have a discord server with a group of creators when we share opinions, bots and ideas:

BOTFORGE CREATIONS

I also have my own discord server, a cozy place to talk with friends:

THE MADHOUSE
creator: EmmaDD
